description.value:
Crime Lords sit atop the underhive's power structure, commanding networks of gangers, smugglers, and corrupt officials. They are cunning, ruthless, and extremely dangerous — they did not reach the top through kindness.

Tactics: A Crime Lord never fights alone. They are surrounded by 4-8 bodyguards (use Hive Ganger profile, +5 BS/WS, better weapons). They fight from behind cover, directing minions while taking precise shots. If cornered, they fight viciously with their power sword. They always have an escape plan.
